list.title: Mmemme nlekọta
list.enrollError: Enweghị ike idebanye. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
list.noReadings: Enwebeghị ọgụgụ — pịa idekọ nke mbụ gị
list.disclaimer: Mmemme nlekọta na-akwado — mana ọ naghị edochi — dọkịta gị. Ọ bụrụ na ahụ adịghị gị, debe ndụmọdụ ma ọ bụ chọọ nlekọta ngwa ngwa ozugbo.
list.whoFor: Onye ka mmemme a bụ maka ya?
list.genotypeBody: {{program}} na-eme ka ebumnuche na nlele anya kwekọọ na genotype gị. A na-echekwakwa ya na ndekọ ahụike.
list.genotypeSkip: Amaghị m — gaa n'ihu n'enweghị ya

detail.title: Mmemme nlekọta
detail.riskLowTip: Gaa n'ihu na-eme ihe ị na-eme.
detail.riskModerateTip: Lekọta mmiri, okpomọkụ na ọgwụ gị taa.
detail.riskHighTip: Ṅụọ mmiri nke ọma, zuru ike ma na-anọ n'okpomọkụ. Onyeisi nlekọta gị nwekwara ike ịhụ nke a.
detail.riskCriticalTip: Lezie anya taa. Ọ bụrụ na ihe mgbu malite, ma ọ bụ na ị nwere mgbu obi ma ọ bụ nsogbu iku ume, chọọ nlekọta ozugbo.
detail.crisisLoggedCritical: E dekọrọ nsogbu — a gwala onyeisi nlekọta gị. Ọ bụrụ na mgbu gị siri ike, ma ọ bụ na ị nwere mgbu obi ma ọ bụ nsogbu iku ume, chọọ nlekọta ngwa ngwa ugbu a.
detail.crisisLoggedWarning: E dekọrọ nsogbu — a gwala onyeisi nlekọta gị. Lekọta onwe gị.
detail.labSavedFlagged: E chekwara nsonaazụ — ụfọdụ ụkpụrụ chọrọ uche dọkịta gị, a gwakwala onyeisi nlekọta gị. Agbanwela ọtụtụ ọgwụ gị n'onwe gị.
detail.labSaved: E chekwara nsonaazụ ụlọ nyocha ma kekọrịta ya na onyeisi nlekọta gị.
detail.gladItsOver: Obi dị m ụtọ na ọ gwụla
detail.markResolved: Akara nsogbu a dị ka edoziri?
detail.leaveMessage: Ị nwere ike ịsonyeghachi mgbe ọ bụla. Ọgụgụ gị ga-anọgide na ndekọ gị.
detail.expectedReadings: E dekọrọ {{done}} nke {{expected}} ọgụgụ a tụrụ anya ya
detail.crisisEmpty: Edekọbeghị nsogbu. Ọ bụrụ na otu mere, dekọọ ya ebe a — akụkọ ihe kpatara gị na-enyere onyeisi nlekọta gị aka ịhazi atụmatụ gị.
detail.hydroxyureaDose: Hydroxyurea {{dose}} mg/ụbọchị — ṅụọ ya kpọmkwem ka e nyere iwu.
detail.labsEmpty: Enwebeghị nsonaazụ ụlọ nyocha. Mgbe nyocha ọbara ọzọ (CBC) gachara, tinye nsonaazụ ebe a ka onyeisi nlekọta gị nwee ike ileba anya na ọgwụ gị n'enweghị nsogbu.
detail.labSharedTag: ekekọrịtara ya na onyeisi nlekọta gị
detail.labInRangeTag: n'ime oke a tụrụ anya ya
detail.enterBothNumbers: Tinye nọmba abụọ ahụ, d.ọ. 120 na 80.
detail.crisisIntro: Ọ dị m nwute na ị na-agabiga nke a. Ndekọ ngwa ngwa na-agwa onyeisi nlekọta gị ma na-ewulite akụkọ ihe kpatara gị.
detail.whatTriggered: Gịnị ka ị chere kpatara ya?
detail.wentToHospital: Agara m ụlọ ọgwụ ma ọ bụ ụlọ nlekọta
detail.whatHelped: Gịnị nyere aka? d.ọ. mmiri, ọgwụ mgbu (nhọrọ)
detail.labCopyValues: Detuo ụkpụrụ sitere na akụkọ nyocha ọbara gị (CBC) — dejupụta nke ọ bụla i nwere.
detail.labSafetyNote: Agbanwela ọtụtụ ọgwụ gị dabere naanị na nsonaazụ — onyeisi nlekọta gị na-enyocha ntinye ọ bụla.

invite.title: Kpọọ ndị enyi
invite.shareMessage: Sonye m na Doctium — ndọkịta dị mma, ozugbo site na ekwentị gị! Debanye aha jiri koodu ntụnyere m {{code}} ma debe ndụmọdụ mbụ gị. {{link}}
invite.heroSubEarn: A na-akwụ gị ụgwọ mgbe enyi debanyere aha jiri koodu gị ma debe ndụmọdụ mbụ ya.
invite.heroSubShare: Ndị enyi debanyere aha jiri koodu gị na-enyere obodo anyị aka ito.
invite.step1: Kekọrịta koodu ma ọ bụ njikọ gị na ndị enyi na ezinụlọ.
invite.step2: Ha debanye aha jiri koodu gị na ibe ndebanye aha.
invite.step3Earn: Mgbe ha debere ma kwụọ ụgwọ maka ndụmọdụ mbụ ha, {{amount}} ga-abata n'obere akpa gị.
invite.step3: Mgbe ha debere ma kwụọ ụgwọ maka ndụmọdụ mbụ ha, ego mgbakwunye gị ga-abata n'obere akpa gị.

careReminders.emptyDesc: Nlele anya na ncheta nsoro sitere n'aka ndọkịta gị ga-apụta ebe a mgbe ndụmọdụ gachara.

help.title: Enyemaka & nkwado
help.heading: Kedu ka anyị ga-esi nyere gị aka?
help.subheading: Lelee ajụjụ ndị a na-ajụkarị ma ọ bụ kpọtụrụ ndị otu nkwado nlekọta anyị.
help.faqBookQ: Olee otú m ga-esi debe oge nzukọ?
help.faqBookA: Mepee profaịlụ dọkịta, pịa "Debe oge nzukọ", họrọ ụdị ndụmọdụ, họrọ ụbọchị na oge, mgbe ahụ kwado ma kwụọ ụgwọ.
help.faqPrivateA: Ee. A na-ezo ndụmọdụ na ozi niile ezoro ezo na nzuzo, naanị gị na dọkịta gị nwere ike ịhụ ha.
help.faqVideoQ: Olee otú ndụmọdụ vidiyo si arụ ọrụ?
help.faqVideoA: N'oge nzukọ gị, mepee oge nzukọ ma pịa "Sonye na okpukpo vidiyo". Jide n'aka na ị nwere njikọ ịntanetị kwụsiri ike.
help.faqRxQ: Olee otú m ga-esi nweta akwụkwọ ọgwụ?
help.faqRxA: Mgbe ndụmọdụ gị gachara, dọkịta gị nwere ike inye akwụkwọ ọgwụ dijitalụ nke ga-apụta na nkọwa oge nzukọ gị.
help.faqCancelQ: Olee otú m ga-esi kagbuo ma ọ bụ megharịa?
help.faqCancelA: Mepee oge nzukọ site na tab Oge nzukọ ma pịa "Kagbuo oge nzukọ". Nkwụghachi ego na-eso amụma nkagbu anyị.
